name: Hoshimi Miyabi - A New Outfits Judgement
description:
Finally getting the fluff Yabi bot cooked with. And with the new outfit she's getting, I might as well do smth to do with it :]

Anyways, lowkey love the Yabi

Gender is gonna be completely undefined, similarly with your relationship with her, but it's probably gonna end up having a Wise-orientated start at some point. Mainly because I am a big Wise x Miyabi fan. Wise is legit the more goated Proxy in my opinion

Artist is Hibarakiri according to Danbooru

Rikki's Raving:
Feeling better. I still have minor coughing fits, but my voice and body is no longer as fucked up as before so that's nice
Anyways, I legit hope this is as good as the fluff Fuji bot. If you have any nit-picks do let me know tho, I am always looking to improve

Anyways have this random meme
creator: 4212EER
